goal: Make every codex-cli auto-review PR comment map each Gemini Medium/Medium+ issue to a resolved, pending, or blocked status.
assumptions: codex-cli processes one Gemini Review per invocation
workflow labels orchestrate multiple review rounds
PR comments and stdout JSON should use the same issue-level status data
risks: A clean summary can hide older pending items if issue-level status is omitted
Security-blocked generated fixes must not be marked as resolved
